title_en: Citi $53K, StanChart $100K, Bernstein $150K — Analysts Are Split
desc_ko: 같은 시장을 보고 세 배 넘게 차이 나는 목표가가 나왔습니다. 왜 이렇게까지 갈렸는지 숫자로 뜯어봤습니다.
desc_en: Looking at the same market, targets diverged by more than 3x. Breaking down exactly why.

title_es: Los Objetivos de Bitcoin de Wall Street Divergen de $53K a $150K
title_de: Wall Streets Bitcoin-Ziele divergieren von $53K bis $150K
desc_es: Citi, Standard Chartered y Bernstein tienen objetivos a 12 meses que van de $53K a $150K. Todos coinciden en que los flujos de ETF deciden la dirección.
desc_de: Citi, Standard Chartered und Bernstein haben 12-Monats-Ziele von $53K bis $150K. Alle stimmen zu, dass ETF-Flüsse die Richtung bestimmen.
